kba_problem_summary: Downloads fail with errors 'Unable to Get Block Name Belonging to Alarm Group' and 'Unable to Open Download List' when the root of an external reference shares the name of a SIF ALARM_GROUP.
severity_justification: Prevents configuration downloads from engineering tools, blocking system updates and maintenance with potential production impact, though no runtime control loss or safety compromise occurs.
occurrence_justification: Requires a specific misconfiguration (external reference root name matching an SIF ALARM_GROUP), which can occur via import or manual path entry but is not common.
detectability_justification: The failure produces explicit error messages immediately upon attempting a download, making the issue directly visible.

modifiers_applied.reason: Simple identification and resolution of unresolved references

architecture_level_description: Livello 3: Ingegneria e gestione (DeltaV Explorer, storico dati, batch)
workaround_description: Identify and resolve all unresolved references where the root of the reference matches a SIF ALARM_GROUP name.
notes: No runtime impact on control loops, safety systems or plant operation. Fix unavailable for v14 (upgrade recommended) and still under investigation for v15/v16. Affects only engineering downloads.
